headline: S&P 500 falls as oil jumps and Trump warns Iran negotiators to 'get serious': Live updates
summary: On Wednesday, the major averages rose on traders' hopes that there would soon be a resolution to the conflict in the Middle East.

headline: Bernstein Raises its Price Target on EOG Resources (EOG) to $167 from $126
summary: EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE:EOG) is one of the 10 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Now. On March 22, 2026, Bernstein raised the price target on EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE:EOG) to $167 from $126 and maintained a Market Perform rating after updating models to reflect current crude prices and crack spreads. Bernstein said geopolitical […]
